name: stray-studio
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for shipping apps, reviewing work, and producing polished artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Build, review, and produce product, content, and artifact deliverables.
interface.longDescription: A repo-local Codex plugin for execution, review, and artifact production. It helps agents build or modify full-stack applications, build and deploy Slack apps with path-specific guidance for Slack CLI workflows, app manifests, Bolt, Deno Slack SDK, workflows, events, and Slack Web API integrations, create corporate websites and landing pages, run findings-first reviews of code, docs, UI, artifacts, skills, plugins, prompts, evals, release readiness, and repository compliance, restyle existing artifacts, shape brand identity, draft articles and proposals, turn operations knowledge into playbooks, create or repair JSON Canvas files, produce polished screenshots or Slack-friendly GIFs, and create production-oriented pixel-art assets such as sprites, icons, item sheets, and tilesets.
defaultPrompt: Build or modify a full-stack app in the current repo, including web, mobile, or desktop user flows, navigation, API integration, auth, and database-backed behavior.
Build, modify, validate, install, or deploy a Slack app using the Slack CLI, app manifests, Bolt, events, slash commands, workflows, or Slack Web API calls.
Create or revise a corporate website with company information architecture, business/service pages, news, careers, IR, sustainability, trust links, and responsive implementation.
Create or overhaul a landing page with conversion-focused structure, messaging, CTA flow, SEO basics, and responsive implementation.
Review code, docs, UI, artifacts, skills, plugins, prompts, evals, release readiness, or repository compliance with findings-first feedback.
Apply a coherent visual theme to an existing artifact such as a doc, deck, HTML page, or existing landing page without changing its core structure.
Create or refine a brand identity direction, brand brief, or mini style guide.
Write or revise an article with a clear audience, angle, and structure.
Draft a decision-oriented proposal, plan, memo, or business case.
Turn operational knowledge into a reusable SOP, runbook, or playbook.
Create or edit a JSON Canvas .canvas file safely.
Capture polished product screenshots for docs or launch assets.
Make a Slack-friendly animated GIF from screenshots or images.
Create, repair, or package pixel-art style sprites, icons, item sheets, animation rows, or tilesets from a concept, reference image, or asset brief.
